generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text raised valid concerns about the practical implications of strategic autonomy, making me reconsider my previous support. The emphasis on reduced allied commitments and lagging preparedness resonated with my cautious nature.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, it's making us LESS secure. Our allies are cutting back on shared defense commitments because they see us pulling away. Meanwhile, our own preparedness is lagging. We can't afford to go it alone when threats are more interconnected than ever. #NationalSecurityFirst #ThinkBeforeYouAutonomy
